title: Documentation Consolidation Analysis
executiveSummary: Analysis of documentation across the SnapBack codebase, including VS Code extension, web application, and shared packages. The analysis covers documentation structure, completeness, accuracy, and opportunities for improvement.
strengths: Well-organized user guides for VS Code extension with clear structure
Comprehensive developer documentation for VS Code extension
User-focused approach in VS Code extension documentation
Consistent formatting across VS Code extension documentation
weaknesses: Limited documentation for web application beyond implementation strategies
Very sparse documentation for shared packages
Inconsistent documentation approaches across different parts of the codebase
Some documentation appears to be implementation guides rather than user/developer documentation
Lack of API documentation for shared packages
recommendations: Create comprehensive README files for all packages in the monorepo
Develop API documentation for shared packages using tools like TypeDoc
Establish consistent documentation standards across all parts of the codebase
Create user guides for the web application similar to the VS Code extension
Develop contribution guidelines for external developers
Implement automated documentation generation and validation in CI/CD pipeline
Create architecture documentation for the entire system
Add examples and tutorials for using the SDK and other packages
